title: The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Nosaurians

"'''The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Nosaurians'''" was an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 9]] written by [[Craig Robert Carey]] and [[Daniel Wallace]]. It was illustrated by [[Darrell Riche]]. It features a characterization of the [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] species and is presented from as a section from [[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life]] by Professor [[Tem Eliss]] of the [[University of Sanbra]].

===Collected in===
*<!-- 2002-03-01 -->[[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]
